title: hopea nodosa
intro: Hopea nodosa, also known as the kepayang tree, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its seeds and bark are used to treat various health conditions. The seeds of Hopea nodosa have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Hopea nodosa can be made into oil or resin, which can be used to treat skin conditions, reduce fever, and even act as a natural insect repellent.
